bird.name: Golden-backed weaver
bird.summary: The Golden-Backed Weaver (Ploceus jacksoni), also known as Jackson's weaver, is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae. This family of b…

relations.subject: Golden-backed weaver
relations.evidence: They most commonly live in marshes, swamps, and in general areas of wet-land. However, more rarely, Golden-backed Weavers can also be found in forests and savannas.thumb|left|250px|From The Ibis, 1888
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: Golden-backed weaver

relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。
